title: Dyngus Day
overview: Stan fled his small town life in search of fame and fortune. Little did he know that he'd be forced to return in order to write the perfect story on the perfect holiday. Stan is met with a myriad of characters including his childhood crush , a deranged homeless man, and the egotistical mayor (these are 3 spearate people BTW) Oh, and did we mention there is a spirit of ancient evil bent on death and destruction?  We Didnt? Our Bad.  Can stan defeat this creature, get the girl and along the way learn the meaning of one of the weirdest holidays ever (that we swear is a real thing)? You'll have to watch the movie to find out! Join local springville heroes, September Brothers, as they present a tale of love, killing and plenty of Krupnik! What else could it be but DYNGUS DAY!
